title: eragrostis acraea
intro: Eragrostis acraea, also known as grass tree, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis acraea include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis acraea can be made into teas, tinctures, or topical creams, and are often used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
